key_corrections: INCORRECT: 'BNM reported RM48.3 billion in 2025' — Official BNM AR 2025: 18.4 billion total e-payment transactions, RM831 billion retail e-payment value, RM43 average e-money transaction size. DOSM separately: RM21.5 billion e-money value in May 2025 alone.
INCORRECT: '56 licensed providers' — FATF/APG Mutual Evaluation (Feb 2025 onsite) lists 48 e-money issuers, not 56.
INCORRECT: 'BNM expects 8-12 viable providers by 2028' — BNM revised E-Money policy (31 Jan 2025) makes no such forecast. Focus is governance/safeguarding, not survivor count.
INCORRECT: 'PDPA has carve-outs for financial services and credit scoring' — PDPA covers banking and financing; only excludes governments and credit reporting business under CRA Act 2010.
INCORRECT: '14 categories of third parties' — No statutory rule. TNG terms show 4 disclosure classes; not 14.

INCORRECT: 'BNM should force interoperability via DuitNow QR by 2027' — DuitNow QR is ALREADY Malaysia's national QR standard under BNM's Interoperable Credit Transfer Framework, supporting payments across banks and e-wallets.
UNVERIFIED: 82% top-3 share, 42 small <5%, RM1.8B operator losses, 28%/74% rural-urban, 4.2M cash-dependent, 85% East Malaysia hawker cash
MISLEADING: '22 million users' = TNG eWallet's late-2024 verified count (now 24M+ in 2025), NOT all-Malaysia user count
CONTRADICTED: TNG announced profitability since Q3 2024 — contradicts blanket sector loss claim
verified_facts_to_use: BNM AR 2025: total e-payment transactions grew 25% to 18.4 billion in 2025; 538 e-payments per Malaysian
BNM AR 2025: retail e-payment transaction value RM831 billion (up 19%)
BNM AR 2025: average e-money transaction size RM43 (up from RM33 in 2024)
BNM AR 2025: DuitNow QR transaction volume doubled to 3 billion in 2025; ~3 million touchpoints
DOSM: e-money transactions RM21.5 billion in May 2025 alone
FATF/APG MER (Feb 2025 onsite): 48 e-money issuers in Malaysia
DuitNow QR is the national interoperable QR standard under BNM's ICTF
TNG Digital announced profitability since Q3 2024
TNG eWallet: 22M verified users late 2024, 24M+ in 2025 (one operator, not market)
BNM e-Duit Desa: 800+ micro merchants onboarded nationwide in 2024
PDPA scope includes banking and financing; excludes only governments and CRA-licensed credit reporting
overall_assessment: Not publication-ready. Most load-bearing numbers and several legal characterisations are unsupported, overstated, or contradicted by primary sources. Most serious problems: unverified RM48.3B figure, fabricated 8-12 BNM forecast, inaccurate DuitNow QR interoperability and PDPA framing. Needs substantial rebuild around verified BNM AR 2025 data.
